violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. In the produce area, using the two comp sink to wash dishes.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. In produce area, there is only a two comp sink. They are using this for handwashing along with cutting up fruit and doing dishes.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Observed missing tiles in the meat department. Observed wall by produce sink damaged at time of inspection.
Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Light in Meat Cooler needs shield.
